description: A client reports that an application running on an Azure VM is slow. Monitoring shows the VM has high CPU usage.

nodes.task_description: Check the performance metrics for the Azure VM and confirm it is CPU-constrained.

expected_outcome.value: The technician verifies CPU usage is constantly over 90%.

nodes.task_description: Recommend upgrading the VM to the next size up to provide more CPU cores.

expected_outcome.value: The client approves the recommendation and the associated cost increase.

nodes.task_description: During a scheduled maintenance window, resize the Azure VM to the larger instance type.

expected_outcome.value: The VM is successfully resized, and performance improves.
